title: ConsentGraph
description: Schema for a ConsentGraph policy file. Defines what actions an AI agent may take autonomously, what requires human approval, and what is permanently blocked.

domains.description: Map of domain names to their action tier definitions.

metadata.description: Optional metadata about this consent graph.

ConsentDomain.description: Action tier definitions for a single domain.

autonomous.description: Actions the agent may execute autonomously. Logged but no notification.

requires_approval.description: Actions requiring human approval. At high confidence (>=0.85) agent executes and notifies (VISIBLE). At low confidence agent asks first (FORCED).

blocked.description: Actions that are permanently prohibited. Attempt is logged and operator is alerted.

trust_level.description: Overall trust level for this domain. Informational only.

ConsentDecay.description: Configuration for automatic consent graph review reminders.
